title: stelis hippocrepica
intro: Stelis hippocrepica, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis, characterized by its unique, helmet-shaped labellum. Traditionally, Stelis hippocrepica has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems like diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of Stelis hippocrepica are often made into teas or infusions, and can be used as a natural remedy for its reported medicinal properties.
